name: example-diagram-node-graph
title: Diagram: Node Graph
description: Render any node/edge concept diagram (neural nets, transformer blocks, system architecture, flowcharts, org charts, state machines) as an interactive CSS/SVG/JS diagram, embeddable standalone or inside a deck slide. Grounds real named architectures via a DuckDuckGo web search instead of guessing structure from memory. Trigger for diagram, node graph, architecture diagram, or interactive diagram requests.

query.en: Diagram {{subject}} as an interactive node/edge graph — search the web to ground the structure if it names a real architecture, then render it as a single self-contained CSS/SVG/JS diagram.

inputs.name: subject
inputs.label: What should it diagram?
inputs.placeholder: e.g. a transformer, OAuth2 flow, our microservice topology
